# connector: # status: required = matching tasks must declare the connector; optional = inventory-covered but not hard-required by deterministic selection.

reason: repo/code/PR state must be read from GitHub rather than guessed
non-trivial work must be planned and progress-validated in Notion
API/library/framework work needs current official documentation
debugging/incident work must inspect runtime error data when available
database/auth/data state must be queried from the configured backend
Postgres-backed database state must be queried from the configured backend
deployment/environment state must be validated from the hosting platform
UI/UX/design work must use the design source-of-truth when available
mobile build/deploy state must be validated through Expo when applicable
Stripe is selected when the task explicitly depends on live Stripe account state

pattern: google drive|drive file|document asset|docs asset|shared document|uploaded document
reason: Drive-backed documents/files must be read from Google Drive when applicable
Sheets-backed data must be read from Google Sheets when applicable
Slack is selected only when the task explicitly depends on Slack workspace state
Linear is selected only when the task depends on Linear project state
Jira is selected only when the task depends on Jira project state
Discord is selected only when the task depends on Discord server state
